goal: Compile capability truth from tracked baseline, promotion decisions, and latest gate evidence so scorecard drift becomes a deterministic CI failure instead of a manual follow-up.
successCriteria: Capability evidence snapshot consumes baseline, tracked decisions, and latest gate artifact deterministically.
Generated truth source, capability-evidence snapshot, and capability scorecard stay in lockstep under CI drift checks.
Verification report can cite the same compiled truth snapshot without transcript-only reasoning.
explicitlyOutOfScope: Promoting module maturity directly inside the truth compiler package.
Turning external docs scraping into the primary truth source.
